subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath revealed the verses every morn and eve, yet none believed in them save those who were seized by the winds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی نزل الایات فی کل صباح و مسا و ماآمنوا بها الا الذین اخذتهم اریاح
subcodes.subjects: @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @chastisement and requital, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @power of the Manifestation of God, @praise and encouragement
